products.name: The Alchemist

products.name: Rich Dad Poor Dad

products.name: Ikigai

products.name: The Power of Now

products.name: Deep Work

products.name: Lakme 9 to 5 Primer + Matte Lipstick
products.description:
Lakme 9 to 5 Primer + Matte Lipstick delivers intense matte color with a built-in primer for smooth application. The lightweight formula provides long-lasting coverage for up to 12 hours without drying your lips.

Enriched with moisturizing ingredients, it keeps lips soft while offering rich pigment in a single swipe. Perfect for office wear, parties, and everyday use.

products.name: Maybelline Fit Me Foundation
products.description:
Maybelline Fit Me Foundation provides natural-looking coverage with a matte finish. Its lightweight formula blends seamlessly into the skin, controlling oil and shine for up to 8 hours.

Available in multiple shades, it is ideal for normal to oily skin types and gives a smooth, pore-less appearance.

products.name: Mamaearth Vitamin C Face Wash
products.description:
Enriched with Vitamin C and turmeric, this face wash deeply cleanses the skin while enhancing natural glow. It helps reduce dullness, remove impurities, and brighten the complexion.

Suitable for all skin types, the gentle formula is free from harmful chemicals and ideal for daily use.

products.name: L'Oreal Paris Total Repair 5 Shampoo
products.description:
L'Oreal Total Repair 5 Shampoo repairs damaged hair caused by heat styling, pollution, and dryness. Its advanced formula strengthens hair from root to tip and reduces breakage.

With regular use, hair feels smoother, shinier, and more manageable.

products.name: Nivea Body Lotion Cocoa Nourish
products.description:
Nivea Cocoa Nourish Body Lotion provides deep moisturization for up to 48 hours. Enriched with cocoa butter and vitamin E, it keeps skin soft, smooth, and hydrated throughout the day.

Perfect for dry and rough skin, especially during winter seasons.

products.name: Garnier Micellar Cleansing Water
products.description:
Garnier Micellar Water removes makeup, dirt, and oil without harsh rubbing. Its gentle, no-rinse formula cleanses and refreshes the skin while maintaining natural moisture balance.

Suitable for sensitive skin and safe for daily use.

products.name: Himalaya Neem Face Pack
products.description:
This herbal face pack helps control acne and remove excess oil. Enriched with neem and turmeric, it purifies pores and improves skin clarity.

Ideal for oily and acne-prone skin types.

products.name: Plum Green Tea Night Gel
products.description:
Plum Green Tea Night Gel hydrates and repairs skin overnight. Its lightweight gel formula absorbs quickly without making skin oily.

It helps reduce acne marks and leaves skin refreshed and glowing by morning.

products.name: Minimalist SPF 50 Sunscreen
products.description:
Minimalist SPF 50 Sunscreen provides broad-spectrum protection against UVA and UVB rays. The lightweight, non-greasy formula prevents sun damage and premature aging.

Suitable for daily wear and all skin types.

products.name: Biotique Bio Cucumber Toner
products.description:
Biotique Bio Cucumber Toner refreshes and tightens pores while balancing skin pH levels. Made with natural botanical extracts, it leaves skin feeling clean and revitalized.

Ideal for normal to oily skin.

products.name: Maybelline Color Show Nail Paint (Red Punch)
products.description: A vibrant nail paint with rich pigmentation that gives salon-like color in just 2 coats. The long-lasting, chip-resistant formula ensures glossy and smooth nails for days. Perfect for daily wear or special occasions.

products.name: Classic Gold Hoop Earrings
products.description: Sleek and stylish gold-tone hoop earrings that complement any outfit — from casual to formal. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear. A must-have staple for every jewelry collection.

products.name: Lakme Eyeconic Kajal
products.description: Intense black kajal that glides on smoothly for bold, dramatic eyes. The long-lasting formula resists smudging and stays comfortable all day. Ideal for both classy and bold makeup looks.

products.name: OnePlus 15R
products.description: The OnePlus 15R is a powerful mid-range flagship smartphone designed for gaming, performance, and long battery life. It offers premium features at a slightly lower price than top flagship phones.

products.name: Nike Air Max 270
products.description: Iconic running shoes with Max Air cushioning. Breathable mesh upper, durable rubber outsole. Available in multiple colors.
